title: Savory Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with sautéed cabbage and gooey cheese. Perfect as a side dish or light meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the tangy dressing and cook for another minute.
Add the meditteranean seasoning and stir to combine.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a serving platter.
Top with shredded gooey cheese and serve immediately.
